title: core/compact_cot: repetitive PLI encode/decode branches
description: In compact_cot.rs:441-520, four PLI variants (Friendly, Hostile, Neutral, Unknown) have identical encode/decode logic. Extract a helper that handles PLI generically: match s if s.is_pli() => { ... Ok(match s { FriendlyPli => CompactCot::FriendlyPli(payload), ... }) }
